results.name: jeremykenedy/laravel-roles
results.description: A Powerful package for handling roles and permissions in Laravel. Supports Laravel 5.3 up to 12.

results.name: codewithdennis/filament-select-tree
results.description: The multi-level select field enables you to make single selections from a predefined list of options that are organized into multiple levels or depths.

results.name: cjmellor/level-up
results.description: This package allows users to gain experience points (XP) and progress through levels by performing actions on your site. It can provide a simple way to track user progress and implement gamification elements into your application

results.name: wendelladriel/laravel-lift
results.description: Take your Eloquent Models to the next level

results.name: shiftonelabs/laravel-cascade-deletes
results.description: Adds application level cascading deletes to Eloquent Models.

results.name: iamfarhad/laravel-audit-log
results.description: Comprehensive entity-level audit logging package for Laravel applications with model-specific tables, field exclusion, and batch processing support

results.name: hafael/azure-mailer-driver
results.description: Supercharge your Laravel or Symfony app with Microsoft Azure Communication Services (ACS)! Effortlessly add email, chat, voice, video, and telephony-over-IP for next-level communication. 🚀

results.name: siro/php-klaviyo-api
results.description: Low level but elegant Klaviyo full API wrapper for PHP with asynchronous track event support

results.name: laravolt/camunda
results.description: High level model, something like Eloquent, to interact with Camunda resources via REST API

results.description: Opiniated High Level producer for laravel-phprdkafka
